notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, alien marching, lives, scoring, mystery ship) but alien bullet collision has a bug (else branch removes bullets that didn't hit player too), shields are non-destructible decorations, alien sprites are just plain rectangles with no pixel art detail, and the march step size (2px) makes aliens move very slowly across the wide canvas.
Missing destructible shields (they are just background art), aliens are solid rectangles with no animation, and alien bullets disappear immediately due to a logic bug.

The game has basic Space Invaders structure and mostly working controls, but a severe alien-bullet update bug removes nearly all bullets instantly, shields are nonfunctional, and the visuals/mechanics are only a simplified approximation.
